channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: The first batch of the files relating to Peter Mandelson's appointment as British ambassador to the US have been released by the government. #PeterMandelson #UK #BreakingNews #Government #BBCNews
item.description: The first batch of the files relating to Peter Mandelson's appointment as British ambassador to the US have been released by the government. #PeterMandelson #UK #BreakingNews #Government #BBCNews

item.title: Ten days after the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, the BBC asked Americans what they think about the war with Iran. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #DonaldTrump #BBCNews
item.description: Ten days after the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, the BBC asked Americans what they think about the war with Iran. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #DonaldTrump #BBCNews

item.title: Planet, the leading satellite image provider, has now added new restrictions for accessing its images. #Planet #Iran #IranWar #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Planet, the leading satellite image provider, has now added new restrictions for accessing its images. #Planet #Iran #IranWar #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Peter Mandelson's severance pay demands were "unacceptable", Chief Secretary to the Prime Minister Darren Jones told MPs. The BBC understands that Lord Mandelson's view is he answered questions about his relationship with Epstein in the vetting process ac
item.description: Peter Mandelson's severance pay demands were "unacceptable", Chief Secretary to the Prime Minister Darren Jones told MPs. The BBC understands that Lord Mandelson's view is he answered questions about his relationship with Epstein in the vetting process ac

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in US-Israeli strikes, was chosen as his successor on Sunday. #Iran #SupremeLeader #MojtabaKhamenei #BBCNews
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in US-Israeli strikes, was chosen as his successor on Sunday. #Iran #SupremeLeader #MojtabaKhamenei #BBCNews

item.title: UAE authorities have said four people were injured when two drones fell at the airport. #Iran #Dubai #MiddleEast #UAE #BBCNews
item.description: UAE authorities have said four people were injured when two drones fell at the airport.  #Iran #Dubai #MiddleEast #UAE #BBCNews

item.title: What’s the impact of the US-Israel war with Iran if you’re looking to buy your first home? #UK #Mortgage #CostOfLiving #Finance #UKNews #BBCNews
item.description: What’s the impact of the US-Israel war with Iran if you’re looking to buy your first home? #UK #Mortgage #CostOfLiving #Finance #UKNews #BBCNews

item.title: For example, an $8.99 (around £6.99) pack will now give 800 V-Bucks, which was 1,000 beforehand. #Fortnite #EpicGames #GameTok #Gaming #BBCGaming #BBCNews
item.description: For example, an $8.99 (around £6.99) pack will now give 800 V-Bucks, which was 1,000 beforehand. #Fortnite #EpicGames #GameTok #Gaming #BBCGaming #BBCNews

item.title: It was nice while it lasted. 🙃 #UKWeather #Forecast #Spring #Snow #BBCNews
item.description: It was nice while it lasted. 🙃 #UKWeather #Forecast #Spring #Snow #BBCNews

item.title: The student loan system in England is a mess, says former Deputy Prime Minister Sir Nick Clegg. The ex-politician has criticised the freezing of the earnings threshold at which graduates pay back their loans. #StudentLoans #Debt #BBCNews
item.description: The student loan system in England is a mess, says former Deputy Prime Minister Sir Nick Clegg. The ex-politician has criticised the freezing of the earnings threshold at which graduates pay back their loans. #StudentLoans #Debt #BBCNews

item.title: BBC bosses said while they are "exceptionally proud" of the show, they have had to make "difficult choices in light of our funding challenges". #IKissedABoy #IKissedAGirl #LGBTQ #TV #BBCNews
item.description: BBC bosses said while they are "exceptionally proud" of the show, they have had to make "difficult choices in light of our funding challenges". #IKissedABoy #IKissedAGirl #LGBTQ #TV #BBCNews

item.title: Government documents have revealed new details about the appointment of Lord Mandelson as the UK's ambassador to the US - and the fallout from his sacking last year. The BBC understands that Lord Mandelson's view is he answered questions about his relatio
item.description: Government documents have revealed new details about the appointment of Lord Mandelson as the UK's ambassador to the US - and the fallout from his sacking last year. The BBC understands that Lord Mandelson's view is he answered questions about his relatio

item.title: US President Donald Trump said Iran had lost “its navy and air force”, adding that “they have no anti-aircraft apparatus at all. They have no radar. Their leaders are gone. And we could do a lot worse.” #Iran #US #DonaldTrump #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran had lost “its navy and air force”, adding that “they have no anti-aircraft apparatus at all. They have no radar. Their leaders are gone. And we could do a lot worse.” #Iran #US #DonaldTrump #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: TikTok removed the accounts examined by BBC Verify and disinformation researchers at Alethea, but it doesn’t believe the videos were part of a covert influence operation, but some may have been trying to monetise videos on its platform #Iran #US #Israel #
item.description: TikTok removed the accounts examined by BBC Verify and disinformation researchers at Alethea, but it doesn’t believe the videos were part of a covert influence operation, but some may have been trying to monetise videos on its platform #Iran #US #Israel #

item.title: It spells the end of historical characters, who have sometimes been controversial, appearing for more than 50 years. #Money #Animals #Wildlife #BBCNews
item.description: It spells the end of historical characters, who have sometimes been controversial, appearing for more than 50 years. #Money #Animals #Wildlife #BBCNews

item.title: The US said it's eliminated 16 mine-laying boats in the Strait of Hormuz after President Trump warned that if Iran blocked the shipping channel it would be deal with "quickly and violently". #Iran #US #StraitOfHormuz #PresidentTrump #BBCNews
item.description: The US said it's eliminated 16 mine-laying boats in the Strait of Hormuz after President Trump warned that if Iran blocked the shipping channel it would be deal with "quickly and violently". #Iran #US #StraitOfHormuz #PresidentTrump #BBCNews

item.title: This eruption episode sent fragments made of ash, pumice, and pieces of volcanic glass into communities, forcing highway closures and the evacuation of tourists. #Volcano #Eruption #Hawaii #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: This eruption episode sent fragments made of ash, pumice, and pieces of volcanic glass into communities, forcing highway closures and the evacuation of tourists. #Volcano #Eruption #Hawaii #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Children who are being helped by Edinburgh Children's Hospital Charity got involved in the sessions which were run by the wildlife conservation charity the Royal Zoological Society of Scotland. #Penguins #Pebbles #Hospital #Charity #Zoo #Edinburgh #Scotla
item.description: Children who are being helped by Edinburgh Children's Hospital Charity got involved in the sessions which were run by the wildlife conservation charity the Royal Zoological Society of Scotland. #Penguins #Pebbles #Hospital #Charity #Zoo #Edinburgh #Scotla

item.title: A jury heard Tony Saxon initially filed a lawsuit in 2023, alleging unsafe working conditions, unpaid wages and wrongful termination. #KanyeWest #Ye #LosAngeles #Court #BBCNews
item.description: A jury heard  Tony Saxon initially filed a lawsuit in 2023, alleging unsafe working conditions, unpaid wages and wrongful termination. #KanyeWest #Ye #LosAngeles #Court #BBCNews

item.title: The Iraqi News Agency reported 38 crew members were rescued and one person died, citing a military official. #Iraq #Iran #Israel #US #MiddleEast #Oil #BBCNews
item.description: The Iraqi News Agency reported 38 crew members were rescued and one person died, citing a military official. #Iraq #Iran #Israel #US #MiddleEast #Oil #BBCNews

item.title: Lloyds Banking Group customers have reported being able to view charges and payments from other sources on Thursday morning. #LloydsBank #Halifax #RBS #Banking #BBCNews
item.description: Lloyds Banking Group customers have reported being able to view charges and payments from other sources on Thursday morning. #LloydsBank #Halifax #RBS #Banking #BBCNews

item.title: Fire crews continue to work on containing a blaze at fuel storage tanks which were struck by drones at the Port of Salalah in Oman, according to state media. #Oman #Fuel #Fire #Drones #BBCNews
item.description: Fire crews continue to work on containing a blaze at fuel storage tanks which were struck by drones at the Port of Salalah in Oman, according to state media. #Oman #Fuel #Fire #Drones #BBCNews

item.title: A poll by Tesco suggests that some one in three 18 to 24-year-olds have not tried a pork pie. #PorkPie #Snacks #FoodTok #GenZ #BBCNews
item.description: A poll by Tesco suggests that some one in three 18 to 24-year-olds have not tried a pork pie. #PorkPie #Snacks #FoodTok #GenZ #BBCNews

item.title: As bombing in Iran continues, those who live there are facing tough choices about whether to remain in the country. The faces of the Iranians we interviewed have been blurred to preserve their anonymity. #Iran #IranWar #Turkey #Iranians #BBCNews
item.description: As bombing in Iran continues, those who live there are facing tough choices about whether to remain in the country. The faces of the Iranians we interviewed have been blurred to preserve their anonymity. #Iran #IranWar #Turkey #Iranians #BBCNews

item.title: Mandy Wixon has been sentenced to 13 years in prison after she was found guilty of keeping a vulnerable woman captive for 25 years. #Tewksbury #Gloucestershire #CrimeTok #BBCNews
item.description: Mandy Wixon has been sentenced to 13 years in prison after she was found guilty of keeping a vulnerable woman captive for 25 years. #Tewksbury #Gloucestershire #CrimeTok #BBCNews

item.title: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows to keep blocking Strait of Hormuz in first statement, adding that Iran will not hesitate to "avenge the blood of Iranians" who have been killed. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows to keep blocking Strait of Hormuz in first statement, adding that Iran will not hesitate to "avenge the blood of Iranians" who have been killed. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: An investigation is underway after customers using Bank of Scotland, Lloyds and Halifax apps reported being able to see other users' transactions on their accounts. #Lloyds #Halifax #RBS #Banking #Finance #Banks #BBCNews
item.description: An investigation is underway after customers using Bank of Scotland, Lloyds and Halifax apps reported being able to see other users' transactions on their accounts. #Lloyds #Halifax #RBS #Banking #Finance #Banks #BBCNews

item.title: The 37-year-old teacher also admitted to spending about £1,000 on fast food for "vulnerable" students. #Teacher #School #Student #Slough #BBCNews
item.description: The 37-year-old teacher also admitted to spending about £1,000 on fast food for "vulnerable" students. #Teacher #School #Student #Slough #BBCNews

item.title: Mandy Wixon has been sentenced to 13 years in prison for keeping a vulnerable woman captive in her home for 25 years. #Court #Sentenced #Tewkesbury #Gloucestershire #News #BBCNews
item.description: Mandy Wixon has been sentenced to 13 years in prison for keeping a vulnerable woman captive in her home for 25 years. #Court #Sentenced #Tewkesbury #Gloucestershire #News #BBCNews

item.title: BBC News sent a questionnaire to more than 5,000 GPs in England and more than 750 replied, with 540 saying they’d never refused to sign off someone sick for mental health. #SickNote #FitNote #MentalHealth #News #BBCNews
item.description: BBC News sent a questionnaire to more than 5,000 GPs in England and more than 750 replied, with 540 saying they’d never refused to sign off someone sick for mental health. #SickNote #FitNote #MentalHealth #News #BBCNews
